DELIOSTHE LONG WINTER OF KINGS · CHARACTER BUILDER

Identity & callings

Custom background — at your DM’s discretion. Backgrounds grant +2/+1 (or +1/+1/+1) among three abilities, two skills, a tool or language, an origin feat, and equipment.
Campaign rule: your first calling starts at 3rd level; added callings start at 1st. Paths are chosen at 3rd level of each calling. Multiclassing needs your DM’s approval and the ability prerequisites; saving throw proficiencies come from your first calling only (2024 rule).

Languages & tools

These, plus your background pick above, fill the sheet’s Tools & Languages box.

The Grit (Delios rules)

Revived from 0 HP? Gain 1 level of exhaustion (Defeat Rule). Damage eats temp HP first; a long rest removes one level of exhaustion.
